block_00: Aapke pahchaan ke pramaan ki samay seema samaapt ho gayi hai
block_02: Kripya dhyaan den ki aapke pahachaan ke pramaan ki samay seema samaapt ho gayi hai. Iska matlab yah hai ki humare saath trade karne ya jama karne ke liye ab aapke paas apne account tak paunch nahin hogi.
block_03: Haalanki, yadi aap humare saath trade karna jaari rakhna chaahte hain, to kripya apne account me nimnalikhit dastaavejon me se koi ek upload karen:
block_08: Dastaavej ek purn prishth hona chahiye, rangeen, dhundhla nahin, aapke naam par jaari kiya gaya aur maanya (jaise samaapt nahin hua ho)
block_09: Hum aapke sahyog ke saraahna karte hain aur aapke liye uplabdh rahte hain.
block_14: Yadi aapke paas koi prashna hai to humari
block_16: ko aapki madad karne me khushi hogi.
